title: DeepSpeed-FastGen: High-Throughput Text Generation via MII and DeepSpeed-Inference
preview: Presents Dynamic SplitFuse scheduling and DeepSpeed-MII to achieve higher throughput and lower latency than vLLM for LLM serving.
summary: Introduces Dynamic SplitFuse, a token-budget-aware scheduling algorithm that splits long prompts and fuses short generations to maintain consistent GPU utilisation. Integrates with DeepSpeed-MII for multi-GPU deployment. Benchmarks show significant throughput improvements over vLLM for mixed prompt/generation workloads.
datacenter: Directly relevant to production LLM serving stack decisions. Dynamic SplitFuse addresses GPU bubble time in continuous batching systems, improving cluster utilisation and reducing cost per token for heterogeneous request distributions.
metrics: Key result signal: throughput improvement over vLLM for mixed short/long prompt workloads on A100 clusters.
